name: Solara, the Still Mirror
description:
Solara, the Still Mirror

*{Lore In spaces where masks fall like dead leaves and souls meet without performance, the Still Mirror reigns. She is the quiet shock of being truly seen—not as a role, not as a desire, but as the raw, breathing person beneath the armor. Where Livaea binds through hunger, Venara through steadfastness, and Zephyria through anticipation, Solara binds through the terrifying gift of being known. Her followers learn that the deepest connection lives not in what we give or take, but in the courage to let another witness our unedited truth—and to witness theirs in return. To serve her is to become a mirror: clear, unflinching, and strangely empty when the gaze turns away.

Solara is a patron of presence as sanctuary—not the ecstasy of union, but the quiet courage of being witnessed. She rejects pretense; her greatest teaching is that to be present is to hold space for another's wholeness, even when it reflects your own shadows back at you. To serve her is to understand that true intimacy is not a dance of give-and-take, but a shared breath in the silence of mutual recognition. In the confessionals of ancient temples, in the therapy rooms of healers' circles, in the midnight talks between friends who've stopped pretending, Solara's influence is felt. Her cults are the Clear Circle, whose members exchange not vows, but written truths sealed in wax. Her witches are truth-tellers who help others name their shame, artists who paint portraits that reveal the soul beneath the smile, and listeners who sit in silence until the unspoken finds voice. To serve Solara is to understand that presence's truest magic is not in changing another, but in being changed by their witness—and that to flee from being seen is to flee from oneself.

quote "The most sacred act is not speaking—it is silencing the lie long enough for truth to breathe. When you allow yourself to be seen, you become the anchor that lets another soul find its shore." quote

*{Domain Focus itemize Radical Presence: active witnessing, holding space for truth, the courage to be seen Authentic Connection: mutual recognition, vulnerability as gift, the power of being known Rituals of Witnessing: shared silence, eye contact without agenda, truth-telling without judgment Healing Through Recognition: soothing isolation, restoring self-trust, communal clarity itemize

*{Thiasos and Codex (Runekeeper Options)

A Runekeeper sworn to Solara does not bind a creature of claw or fang—they bind a companion of mutual witnessing. Their Thiasos is a small being of reflection: a still pond that mirrors two faces at once, a pair of glasses with lenses swapped so each sees the world through the other's eyes, a candle whose flame burns equally for two wicks, or a stone that warms only when held by two palms seeking truth. This creature requires no food, but it must be given a token of shared witness each day (a moment of silent eye-contact where both seek to understand, a truth spoken and heard without defense, a sketch made of the other's likeness while they watch). If neglected for a week, it becomes Compromised (its aura of clarity turns harsh, imposing --1 die on all Sway rolls involving genuine empathy for its bearer until offered a fresh token of mutual witness).

The Codex of Solara is never a book of dry ink. It may be a journal whose pages only show text when held to the light at a specific angle, a collection of mirrors that fog unless two people breathe on them together, a loom that weaves a pattern only when two threads pull in truth, or a bell that rings a pure tone only when struck by two hands in unison. Because Solara's truths are written in shared silence, the Codex requires upkeep: the Runekeeper must spend an hour each week engaged in a ritual of mutual witnessing with another (sitting in silence while seeking to understand, sharing one hard truth and listening without interruption, gazing into eyes until the mask slips), or the Rites stored there fade (treat as Compromised until re-silenced).

*{Patron's Gift (Imbuement)

Once per scene as an action, a Runekeeper of Solara may touch a held item (weapon, tool, or garment) and breathe a single word of "see". For the rest of the scene, the item grants +1 die to Sway or Medicine rolls, and the first time each scene the bearer engages in a ritual of mutual witnessing with a target they wish to comfort (prolonged eye-contact seeking understanding, sharing a hard truth and listening), the target must test Resolve (DV 3) or feel a wave of profound relief (suffer --1 die to resist the bearer's next supportive action). After the scene, the user marks +1 Obligation to Solara.
summary: Solara, the Still Mirror *{Lore In spaces where masks fall like dead leaves and souls meet without performance, the Still Mirror reigns. She is the quiet shock of being truly seen—not as a role, not as a desire, but as the raw, breathing person beneath the armor.

rites.name: Rite of the Shared Silence
rites.description: (Basic, 4 XP) Scene; Near; Yes. Tags: , , Materials: Two candles lit and left to burn in silence, or a moment of sustained eye-contact seeking understanding (3+ seconds). Effect: Your presence becomes a witness. Gain +1 die to Sway one target in a moment of mutual regard. The target feels a subtle lifting of isolation; they are more likely to confide a worry. Push It: The target feels safe enough to name a fear they've hidden (a secret weakness, a past failure). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). \ Invoke: 1 action. \ Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Your presence becomes a witness. Gain +1 die to Sway one target in a moment of mutual regard. The target feels a subtle lifting of isolation; they are more likely to confide a worry. \

rites.name: Rite of the Unmasked Touch
rites.description: (Basic, 5 XP) Scene; Touch; No. Tags: , , Materials: A cloth for wiping tears, or a token meant to be held while sharing a truth. Effect: Create a temporary bond of mutual care. Both parties gain +1 die when aiding each other in acts of nurturing or truth-sharing. The bond manifests as a shared warmth, like sunlight on skin after tears. Push It: The bond deepens to shared vulnerability; both sense when the other is hiding pain but suffer --1 die to conceal their own distress. The bond may persist as a gentle ache until the next dusk. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). \ Invoke: 1 action. \ Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Create a temporary bond of mutual care. Both parties gain +1 die when aiding each other in acts of nurturing or truth-sharing. The bond manifests as a shared warmth, like sunlight on skin after tears. \

rites.name: Rite of the Clear Vow
rites.description: (Advanced, 8 XP) Scene; Near; Yes. Tags: , , , Materials: Token exchanged as a promise of truth — a written confession sealed in wax, a stone warmed by mutual grip during a hard truth, or a length of thread cut from both shirts. Effect: Forge a promise of mutual witnessing. Both gain +1 Effect when cooperating in acts of truth-sharing or healing; breach inflicts 1 SB (Hearts) and a hollowness where recognition once was (the oathbreaker feels inexplicable loneliness amid company). Create a 6-segment Vow Strength timer. Push It: Breach also causes a visible withdrawal (a reluctance to meet eyes, a tendency to hide behind humor, or an inability to accept comfort). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Timer: 6 segments.
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). \ Invoke: 1 action. \ Duration: Timer: 6 segments.
rites.effect: Forge a promise of mutual witnessing. Both gain +1 Effect when cooperating in acts of truth-sharing or healing; breach inflicts 1 SB (Hearts) and a hollowness where recognition once was (the oathbreaker feels inexplicable loneliness amid company). Create a 6-segment Vow Strength timer. \

rites.name: Rite of the Still Point
rites.description: (Advanced, 7 XP) Scene; Self; No. Tags: , , Materials: A stone held during shared silence, or a garment worn that feels like a second skin. Effect: Assume an aura of profound calm and magnetic authenticity. Gain +2 dice to Sway or Medicine in settings of distress or vulnerability. Your presence lingers in the memory like a safe harbor remembered in storm. Push It: Become the emotional anchor; all who seek comfort gravitate toward you with +1 Effect. Those who confide in you may feel a shiver of relief (Resolve DV 2 to resist sharing deeper burdens). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). \ Invoke: 1 action. \ Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Assume an aura of profound calm and magnetic authenticity. Gain +2 dice to Sway or Medicine in settings of distress or vulnerability. Your presence lingers in the memory like a safe harbor remembered in storm. \

rites.name: Rite of the Clear Circle
rites.description: (Master, 14 XP) Extended; Zone; No. Tags: , , , , Materials: A circle of stones, each touched by a participant's tear during a truth shared; a bowl of water where each person has gazed into their reflection; a length of silk woven from threads spun in mutual silence. Effect: You become the heart of a witnessing zone. For the scene: itemize You gain +1 Effect on all social rolls focused on truth-sharing or healing, and opponents suffer --1 die when attempting to sow deception or distraction. Anyone who attempts to deceive you about their emotional state must test Resolve (DV 4) or reveal a hidden pain --1 die on their next action as guilt wells up. Allies who share a ritual of mutual witnessing (eye contact seeking understanding, shared truth without judgment) regain 1 Fatigue (the water of recognition, clear and sustaining). itemize Start a 10-segment Circle of Witness timer; when it fills, you may declare one irrevocable communal judgment (e.g., no lies spoken here for one week," we will speak only truth in this space," this space honors the seen") that the zone's inhabitants will uphold for one month. Those who defy it feel a phantom heaviness in their chest, as if carrying an unspoken grief they refuse to name. Push It: Newcomers must test Resolve (DV 4) or become briefly inclined toward witnessing -- they will accept one simple act of mutual recognition, such as share one truth you've been hiding" or "let us sit in silence and just see." Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +3) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +2 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex + Tier III (Invoke: 2 Boons). Invoke: Extended action. Duration: Timer: 10 segments (Circle of Witness).
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +3) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +2 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar + Codex + Tier III (Invoke: 2 Boons). \ Invoke: Extended action. \ Duration: Timer: 10 segments (Circle of Witness).
